commands: curl -s http://localhost:4000/api/constraints || echo 'Coordination service not available - continuing without it'
curl -s http://localhost:4000/api/context || echo 'Context service not available - using local files'

environment_verification.command: curl -X POST http://localhost:4000/api/verify-environment || echo 'Using local environment verification'

on_session_start: Check for recent changes by other agents (if coordination enabled)
Alert user to any version warnings
before_version_changes: Log planned action to coordinator (if available)
Get user confirmation for risky changes

container_verification: docker exec lingolinq_backend bundle exec rails -v

version_mismatch_detected: Use Docker containers instead of host system

communication_protocol.before_major_changes: Log to local files if coordination API unavailable
communication_protocol.conflict_resolution: Check recent changes in local files or via coordinator API if available
communication_protocol.handoff_procedure: Log completion and update shared context (local files as fallback)

templates.session_start_message:
🤖 Claude Code initialized for LingoLinq AAC
✅ Environment verified
📋 Project constraints loaded
🔄 Agent coordination: {coordination_status}

Development environment ready:
- Use Docker for legacy testing (Ruby 3.2.8, Node.js 18.x)
- Modern Ruby/Node.js versions welcome for new development
templates.version_warning:
⚠️ VERSION NOTICE: Version updates are welcome!
🔧 For legacy testing: Use Docker (Ruby 3.2.8, Node.js 18.x)
🚀 For modern development: Upgrade Ruby/Node.js as needed
💡 Use Docker containers to test both environments
templates.coordination_update:
📡 Coordinating with other agents...
📝 Logging action: {action}
🔄 Updating shared context
✅ Coordination complete
